# Progress

Shows the completion progress of a task.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/progress
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview
  slug="progress"
  example={0}
  code={`<Progress aria-label="Upload" value={42} />`}
/>

```tsx
<Progress aria-label="Upload" value={42} />
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="progress"
  example={1}
  code={`<Progress aria-label="Sync" max={200} value={120} size="lg" />`}
/>

```tsx
<Progress aria-label="Sync" max={200} value={120} size="lg" />
```

<ComponentPreview slug="progress" example={2} code={`<Progress aria-label="Loading" />`} />

```tsx
<Progress aria-label="Loading" />
```

## Props

| Prop   | Type           | Required | Default | Description |
| ------ | -------------- | -------- | ------- | ----------- |
| `size` | `ProgressSize` | No       | -       | -           |

## Variants

| Variant | Values           |
| ------- | ---------------- |
| `size`  | `sm`, `md`, `lg` |

## Registry

- Manifest: `/r/progress.json`
- Recipe: `progress`
- Files: `src/components/ui/progress.tsx`
